records.m_Talk_ENG: Here you are, Ms. Chairwoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, thank you, Ms. Lucid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, thank you, Ms. Lucid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, thank you, Ms. Lucid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But why did you want Naielle's novel, all of a sudden...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But why did you want Naielle's novel, all of a sudden...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But why did you want Naielle's novel, all of a sudden...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah ha ha, well... we need this to save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah ha ha, well... we need this to save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah ha ha, well... we need this to save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll start reading it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll start reading it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll start reading it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their wills, passed down from the start of time, flow in my soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their wills, passed down from the start of time, flow in my soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their wills, passed down from the start of time, flow in my soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the power of the entire universe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the power of the entire universe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the power of the entire universe...

records.m_Talk_ENG: AAAAAAAGH!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AAAAAAAGH!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AAAAAAAGH!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?! Where did you get that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?! Where did you get that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?! Where did you get that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle. The Chairwoman just told me what's going on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle. The Chairwoman just told me what's going on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle. The Chairwoman just told me what's going on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You used to read a lot of books to Eins and Zwei as volunteer work, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You used to read a lot of books to Eins and Zwei as volunteer work, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You used to read a lot of books to Eins and Zwei as volunteer work, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The children loved that book the most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The children loved that book the most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The children loved that book the most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's Naielle! Hi, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's Naielle! Hi, Naielle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's Naielle! Hi, Naielle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! I think Naielle is going to fight the legendary knight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! I think Naielle is going to fight the legendary knight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! I think Naielle is going to fight the legendary knight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The students are cheering for you. Please, save the world for everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The students are cheering for you. Please, save the world for everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The students are cheering for you. Please, save the world for everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, w-wait!! I don't understand what's going on right now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, w-wait!! I don't understand what's going on right now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, w-wait!! I don't understand what's going on right now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are ya so embarrassed 'bout? Didn't ya read it out loud to the children?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are ya so embarrassed 'bout? Didn't ya read it out loud to the children?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are ya so embarrassed 'bout? Didn't ya read it out loud to the children?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because they were kids! It's embarrassing to read it to the public!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because they were kids! It's embarrassing to read it to the public!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because they were kids! It's embarrassing to read it to the public!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There will be... a livestream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There will be... a livestream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There will be... a livestream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A livestream of Naielle... to everyone in the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A livestream of Naielle... to everyone in the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A livestream of Naielle... to everyone in the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mi Rinae! Is this the plan you told me about?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mi Rinae! Is this the plan you told me about?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mi Rinae! Is this the plan you told me about?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yup. We're gonna take advantage of the others' subconscious manifestation of CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup. We're gonna take advantage of the others' subconscious manifestation of CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup. We're gonna take advantage of the others' subconscious manifestation of CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're gonna change their perception with the appearance of the hero you admire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're gonna change their perception with the appearance of the hero you admire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're gonna change their perception with the appearance of the hero you admire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Overlord is goin' berserk because of negative emotions, this plan is to stabilize it with positive emotions through ya.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Overlord is goin' berserk because of negative emotions, this plan is to stabilize it with positive emotions through ya.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Overlord is goin' berserk because of negative emotions, this plan is to stabilize it with positive emotions through ya.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that was pretty easy to understand. Ya got all that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that was pretty easy to understand. Ya got all that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that was pretty easy to understand. Ya got all that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! It's gon' be aight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! It's gon' be aight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! It's gon' be aight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dontcha know professional wrestlin'? Think of this bein' scripted like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dontcha know professional wrestlin'? Think of this bein' scripted like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dontcha know professional wrestlin'? Think of this bein' scripted like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't ya say ya wanted to save the players and Counters Legacy? Are ya scared?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't ya say ya wanted to save the players and Counters Legacy? Are ya scared?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't ya say ya wanted to save the players and Counters Legacy? Are ya scared?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's finished... the modeling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's finished... the modeling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's finished... the modeling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The costume for... the hero of humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The costume for... the hero of humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The costume for... the hero of humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is... me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is... me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is... me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! Ain't that a cool outfit! It looks just like the one from the story!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! Ain't that a cool outfit! It looks just like the one from the story!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! Ain't that a cool outfit! It looks just like the one from the story!

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-really...? I guess it's cool, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-really...? I guess it's cool, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-really...? I guess it's cool, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Fine, I'll do it! But what about the livestream?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Fine, I'll do it! But what about the livestream?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Fine, I'll do it! But what about the livestream?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave that to me. I'll do anything to save Counters Legacy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave that to me. I'll do anything to save Counters Legacy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave that to me. I'll do anything to save Counters Legacy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I brought HRT Berry here because I thought they would be able to help us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I brought HRT Berry here because I thought they would be able to help us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I brought HRT Berry here because I thought they would be able to help us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hello, everyone. We came after hearing that you needed our help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-hello, everyone. We came after hearing that you needed our help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-hello, everyone. We came after hearing that you needed our help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All we need to do is gather a lot of viewers, right? We can do that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All we need to do is gather a lot of viewers, right? We can do that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All we need to do is gather a lot of viewers, right? We can do that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Garam...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Garam...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Garam...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! I guess pipsqueak is finally being useful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! I guess pipsqueak is finally being useful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! I guess pipsqueak is finally being useful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm sorry, Naielle. Guess I'm not fit to be a teacher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm sorry, Naielle. Guess I'm not fit to be a teacher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm sorry, Naielle. Guess I'm not fit to be a teacher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take full responsibility for this. I really apologize.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take full responsibility for this. I really apologize.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take full responsibility for this. I really apologize.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Make your apology to the players. I'm cool, so I've already forgotten about it, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Make your apology to the players. I'm cool, so I've already forgotten about it, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Make your apology to the players. I'm cool, so I've already forgotten about it, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can talk about it once this is all settled.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can talk about it once this is all settled.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can talk about it once this is all settled.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Log me in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Log me in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Log me in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It feels completely different from what it used to look like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It feels completely different from what it used to look like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It feels completely different from what it used to look like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I fail, it will only be a matter of time before this place really turns into the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I fail, it will only be a matter of time before this place really turns into the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I fail, it will only be a matter of time before this place really turns into the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hi, everyone. This is Miya from HRT Berry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hi, everyone. This is Miya from HRT Berry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hi, everyone. This is Miya from HRT Berry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today, we're going to show you Counters Legacy's biggest update in history, the Infinite Defense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today, we're going to show you Counters Legacy's biggest update in history, the Infinite Defense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today, we're going to show you Counters Legacy's biggest update in history, the Infinite Defense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-hold on! All of them are Category 3 C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle! We're here to help!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! Doesn't a hero need to have great sidekicks?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! Doesn't a hero need to have great sidekicks?
